name: Chase Ritz-Carlton Credit Card
annual_fee_details: $450. No longer available to new applicants (discontinued).

welcome_offer.description: No longer available. Previously offered 3 free nights after first purchase (up to 50k points each).

earning_rates.notes: Earn 3x points per $1 on travel purchases (airlines, hotels, car rentals, etc.) worldwide.
Earn 3x points per $1 at restaurants worldwide.
Earn 2x points per $1 on all other purchases.
Earn 6x points per $1 at Marriott properties worldwide.

hotel_status.benefit: Complimentary Gold Elite status as long as card is open. Benefits include 25% bonus on base points at Marriott, upgraded room (when available), late checkout, and more.

other_benefits.description: Unlimited Priority Pass Select membership for cardholder + 1 guest at 1,300+ airport lounges worldwide.
Up to $100 statement credit for Global Entry or TSA PreCheck application fee every 4 years.
24/7 access to travel and emergency assistance services.
Up to $3,000 per passenger for lost or damaged checked or carry-on baggage.

insurance.rental_insurance: Primary Auto Rental Collision Damage Waiver — covers rental vehicles worldwide, up to $75,000.
insurance.trip_delay_details: Reimbursement of up to $500 per ticket for trip delays over 6 hours (requires tickets purchased with the card).
insurance.trip_cancellation_details: Trip Cancellation Insurance — up to $10,000 per person / $20,000 per trip for covered cancellations.
insurance.purchase_protection_details: Covers new purchases against damage or theft for 120 days, up to $50,000 per claim / $100,000 per year.
insurance.extended_warranty_details: Extends U.S. manufacturer's warranty by an additional year on eligible warranties of 3 years or less.

rules.description: Chase 5/24 rule applies. Cannot be approved if 5 or more new accounts opened in the past 24 months.
No longer open to new applicants. Existing cardholders may keep the card or product change to a different Chase card.

application_rules.notes: This card has been discontinued by Chase. Existing cardholders can continue using the card. Contact Chase to discuss product change options.

discontinued_notes: Discontinued to new applicants. Existing cardholders may keep the card open. Marriott Bonvoy Boundless is a similar alternative with lower annual fee ($95).

recurring_credits.name: $300 Travel Credit
recurring_credits.description: $300 annual credit automatically applied to travel purchases.

recurring_credits.name: DoorDash Non-Restaurant Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $10 off one qualifying non-restaurant DoorDash order each calendar quarter (DashMart, 7-Eleven, CVS, Safeway, etc.). Requires active DashPass enrollment. Per Chase cobrand-doordash terms.
